hooks.command: echo '=== POST-COMPACTION CONTEXT REFRESH ==='; if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md" ]; then head -30 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md"; fi; echo '---'; if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/transfer-context.json" ]; then echo 'Transfer context available at .claude/transfer-context.json'; fi; echo 'Skills: /dev /wrap-up /tdd /debug /learn /phase-review /skill-check'; echo 'Read Session Handoff in CLAUDE.md for current state.'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Forge"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Claude Forge' 'Claude needs your attention' 2>/dev/null || true
